recommendations.title: The Lego Movie
recommendations.overview: An ordinary Lego mini-figure, mistakenly thought to be the extraordinary MasterBuilder, is recruited to join a quest to stop an evil Lego tyrant from conquering the universe.

recommendations.title: A LEGO Brickumentary
recommendations.overview: A look at the global culture and appeal of the LEGO building-block toys.

recommendations.title: Donnie Brasco
recommendations.overview: An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and identifies more with the mafia life at the expense of his regular one.

recommendations.title: College
recommendations.overview: A wild weekend is in store for three high school seniors who visit a local college campus as prospective freshmen.

recommendations.title: Dude
recommendations.overview: Four best friends negotiate loss and major life changes during the last two weeks of high school.
